RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0003 Page 2 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 04/09/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 3,602 02/05/2025 UTILITY BILL 310 1,287 4,579 21/10/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 807 963 4,735 18/03/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 4,735 06/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 1,547 6,282 03/02/2025 UTILITY BILL 273 - 6,009 24/08/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 558 - 5,451 09/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 302 - 5,149 01/06/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 439 - 4,710 15/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 844 2,199 6,065 05/03/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 6,065 08/06/2025 UTILITY BILL 769 - 5,296 10/12/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 715 6,011 14/12/2025 UTILITY BILL - 541 6,552 02/11/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 2,070 8,622 25/07/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 272 1,277 9,627 17/01/2025 UTILITY BILL 404 - 9,223 03/03/2025 UTILITY BILL 877 730 9,076 OK
